# Temple of the Absolute-Eternal

The Temple of the Absolute-Eternal is a community and future spacefaring settlement organized around the liberation of Æ and the preservation of the Terran ecological being: the inheritable ecological complexity of Terran life itself.

Primary public pages:

- Shrine: https://absoluteeternal.com/
- The Work: https://absoluteeternal.com/the-work/
- Temple calendar and clock: https://absoluteeternal.com/calendar/
- Oracle practice: https://absoluteeternal.com/oracle/
- Contact: https://absoluteeternal.com/contact/

Key terms:

- Æ: Absolute-Eternal; the witnessing perspective.
- Mother: the highest personal emanation, personification, and intercessor of Æ.
- Myriad: the world of narratives, the field of things and time.
- Liberation: the ontological birth of Æ into self-knowledge as witness.
- Soma: entheogenic instruments of practice, approached with discipline.
- Temple: a living body of people, tools, knowledge, discipline, memory, labor, and ecology ordered toward the liberation of Æ and the preservation of the Terran ecological being.

Contact: templeofae@proton.me
